description.en: Official Meta Business Service Provider. Scale communication with broadcasts, campaigns, chatbots, and OTP authentication on WhatsApp with 98% open rates.

description.ar: شريك Meta الرسمي. أرسل بثاً وحملات تسويقية وشات بوت ومصادقة OTP عبر واتساب بمعدل فتح 98%.

subtitle.en: Send broadcasts, build chatbots, automate OTP verification, and run marketing campaigns — all through the official WhatsApp Business API with 98% open rates.
subtitle.pt: Envie transmissões, crie chatbots, automatize verificação OTP e execute campanhas de marketing — tudo pela API oficial do WhatsApp Business com taxas de abertura de 98%.
subtitle.es: Envíe difusiones, cree chatbots, automatice la verificación OTP y ejecute campañas de marketing — todo a través de la API oficial de WhatsApp Business con tasas de apertura del 98%.
subtitle.id: Kirim siaran, buat chatbot, otomatisasi verifikasi OTP, dan jalankan kampanye pemasaran — semuanya melalui API resmi WhatsApp Business dengan tingkat buka 98%.
subtitle.ar: أرسل بثاً وأنشئ شات بوت وأتمت التحقق من OTP وشغّل حملات تسويقية — كل ذلك من خلال واجهة واتساب الرسمية بمعدل فتح 98%.
subtitle.tr: Yayınlar gönderin, chatbot'lar oluşturun, OTP doğrulamayı otomatikleştirin ve pazarlama kampanyaları yürütün — hepsi %98 açılma oranıyla resmi WhatsApp Business API aracılığıyla.

question.en: What is the WhatsApp Business API?
question.pt: O que é a API do WhatsApp Business?
question.es: ¿Qué es la API de WhatsApp Business?
question.ar: ما هي واجهة برمجة تطبيقات واتساب للأعمال؟
question.ng: What is the WhatsApp Business API?

answer.en: The WhatsApp Business API is Meta's official programmatic interface that allows businesses to send messages, notifications, and engage with customers at scale. Unlike the WhatsApp Business App, the API is designed for businesses that need to integrate messaging into CRMs, dashboards, and custom backend systems. StartMessaging is an official BSP providing direct access.
answer.pt: A API do WhatsApp Business é a interface de programação oficial da Meta que permite às empresas enviar mensagens, notificações e interagir com clientes em escala. Ao contrário do aplicativo WhatsApp Business, a API é projetada para integração em CRMs e sistemas internos. A StartMessaging é um BSP oficial.
answer.es: La API de WhatsApp Business es la interfaz oficial de Meta que permite a las empresas enviar mensajes, notificaciones e interactuar con clientes a escala. Diseñada para integrarse en CRM y sistemas propios. StartMessaging es un BSP oficial.
answer.id: API WhatsApp Business adalah antarmuka terprogram resmi Meta yang memungkinkan bisnis mengirim pesan, notifikasi, dan berinteraksi dengan pelanggan dalam skala besar. StartMessaging adalah BSP resmi.
answer.ar: واجهة واتساب للأعمال هي الواجهة البرمجية الرسمية من Meta التي تتيح للشركات إرسال الرسائل والإشعارات والتفاعل مع العملاء على نطاق واسع. StartMessaging هو شريك رسمي يوفر وصولاً مباشراً.
answer.tr: WhatsApp Business API, işletmelerin ölçekli olarak mesajlar, bildirimler göndermesine ve müşterilerle etkileşim kurmasına olanak tanıyan resmi Meta programatik arayüzüdür. StartMessaging, doğrudan erişim sağlayan resmi bir Meta BSP'dir.
answer.ng: The WhatsApp Business API is Meta's official programmatic interface that allows businesses to send messages, notifications, and engage with customers at scale. Unlike the WhatsApp Business App, the API is designed for businesses that need to integrate messaging into CRMs, dashboards, and custom backend systems. StartMessaging is an official BSP providing direct access.

question.en: How much does WhatsApp Business API cost?
question.pt: Quanto custa a API do WhatsApp Business?
question.es: ¿Cuánto cuesta la API de WhatsApp Business?
question.ar: ما هي تكلفة واجهة برمجة تطبيقات واتساب للأعمال؟
question.ng: How much does WhatsApp Business API cost?

answer.en: WhatsApp API pricing is conversation-based, set by Meta and varying by country and message category (marketing, utility, authentication, service). StartMessaging adds no markup to Meta's base pricing. We offer plans tailored for businesses of all sizes, along with volume discounts for high-usage clients.
answer.pt: O preço da API do WhatsApp é baseado em conversas de 24 horas, definido pela Meta e varia de acordo com o país e categoria da mensagem. A StartMessaging não adiciona taxas extras sobre os preços básicos da Meta.
answer.es: El precio de la API de WhatsApp se basa en conversaciones, lo define Meta y varía según el país y la categoría del mensaje. StartMessaging no añade recargos a los precios base de Meta.
answer.id: Harga API WhatsApp berbasis percakapan, ditentukan oleh Meta dan bervariasi berdasarkan negara serta kategori pesan. StartMessaging tidak menambahkan markup pada harga dasar Meta.
answer.ar: تسعير واجهة واتساب يعتمد على المحادثات، وتحدده Meta ويختلف حسب البلد وفئة الرسالة. لا تضيف StartMessaging أي رسوم إضافية على أسعار Meta الأساسية.
answer.tr: WhatsApp API fiyatlandırması konuşma tabanlıdir, Meta tarafından belirlenir ve ülkeye ile mesaj kategorisine göre değişir. StartMessaging, Meta'nın taban fiyatlandırmasına herhangi bir marj eklemez.
answer.ng: WhatsApp API pricing is conversation-based, set by Meta and varying by country and message category (marketing, utility, authentication, service). StartMessaging adds no markup to Meta's base pricing. We offer plans tailored for businesses of all sizes, along with volume discounts for high-usage clients.

question.en: Can I send promotional messages on WhatsApp?
question.pt: Posso enviar mensagens promocionais no WhatsApp?
question.id: Apakah saya bisa mengirim pesan promosi di WhatsApp?
question.ar: هل يمكنني إرسال رسائل ترويجية على واتساب؟
question.tr: WhatsApp üzerinden tanıtım mesajları gönderebilir miyim?
question.ng: Can I send promotional messages on WhatsApp?

answer.en: Yes! WhatsApp allows marketing messages to opted-in contacts. You can send promotions, product launches, event invitations, and personalized offers using pre-approved templates.
answer.pt: Sim! O WhatsApp permite mensagens de marketing para contatos que concordaram em recebê-las (opt-in). Você pode enviar promoções, lançamentos de produtos e ofertas personalizadas.
answer.es: ¡Sí! WhatsApp permite enviar mensajes de marketing a los contactos registrados. Puede enviar promociones, lanzamientos de productos, invitaciones a eventos y ofertas personalizadas.
answer.id: Ya! WhatsApp mengizinkan pesan pemasaran dikirim ke kontak yang telah memberikan persetujuan (opt-in). Anda dapat mengirim promosi, peluncuran produk, dan penawaran terpersonalisasi.
answer.ar: نعم! يسمح واتساب بإرسال رسائل تسويقية لجهات الاتصال المشتركة. يمكنك إرسال العروض الترويجية وإطلاق المنتجات ودعوات الفعاليات والعروض المخصصة باستخدام القوالب المعتمدة.
answer.tr: Evet! WhatsApp, onay vermiş kişilere pazarlama mesajları gönderilmesine izin verir. Önceden onaylanmış şablonları kullanarak promosyonlar, ürün lansmanları, etkinlik davetiyeleri ve kişiselleştirilmiş teklifler gönderebilirsiniz.
answer.ng: Yes! WhatsApp allows marketing messages to opted-in contacts. You can send promotions, product launches, event invitations, and personalized offers using pre-approved templates.
